context.projectOverview: agent-bober — multi-agent harness. Phase 4 makes a 'team' a data object. Sprint 1 (DONE) added the Team data model + loadTeam(config, teamId?) in src/teams/ with a built-in 'programming' team whose memoryNamespace is '' (sentinel for the current .bober/memory/ path). Sprint 2 threads an optional per-team namespace through the lessons memory store and all callers so two teams' lessons are fully isolated, while the default/programming namespace keeps the existing .bober/memory/ path (no migration).

completedSprints.title: Team data model + registry + programming team as instance #1
completedSprints.summary: src/teams/types.ts (Team, Role), src/teams/registry.ts (loadTeam + built-in programming team, memoryNamespace '' sentinel), src/config/schema.ts (optional teams record + defaultTeam). Zero behavior change; commit 274338b.
